name: @pm-go/sample-repos
description: Static TypeScript sample-repo fixtures for the Phase 7 matrix/chaos harness. Each subdirectory under this package is a self-contained mini-project the harness copies into a tmpdir before running a phase5-shape smoke against stub executors. No runtime code lives here.

scripts.typecheck: echo '[sample-repos] fixtures are not typechecked by the workspace' && exit 0
